specific_location: SE of the diagonal and Hyw 119.
description: Warbler size yet primarily stayed along the stream going in and out of the folage and dissappearing for several minutes. Dark brown solid uper and brown streaked below on a white belly. Bright white supercilium that got broader and bolder on the rear. Bright pink legs and no spots on the white throat.Behaviors: Very secreative along the stream banks. Going in and out of the folage along the back. Obviously, a warbler that liked to be next to the water.Call: noPlumage: basic
photographer: Photographer: Gregg Goodrich, Gregg Goodrich, Gregg Goodrich
